entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'Complete all tier 2 cosmetic gaps

TIER 2: HIGH VISIBILITY (Daily Friction)
11. Git Diff Side-by-Side
Gap: Git context shows text only—no visual diff
Market Standard: JetBrains diff viewer with color blocks
Fix: Render diff in Win32IDE_Annotations.cpp using D3D11 overlay lines
12. Integrated Terminal Tabs
Gap: Single PowerShell panel only
Market Standard: Multi-tab terminal (bash, PS, CMD)
Fix: Extend Win32IDE_PowerShellPanel.cpp with tab control + profile switching
13. Hover Documentation Tooltips
Gap: LSP hover info shows in sidebar, not inline
Market Standard: Monaco hover widget with Markdown
Fix: Trigger WM_MOUSEHOVER → popup HWND with WebView2 content in Win32IDE_LSPClient.cpp
14. Parameter Hints (Signature Help)
Gap: No inline intellisense for function parameters
Market Standard: function(|arg1, arg2|) overlay
Fix: Hook LSP textDocument/signatureHelp → floating tooltip near cursor
15. Document Symbols Outline
Gap: No "Outline" panel for current file structure
Market Standard: VS Code Outline view with filter
Fix: Populate treeview in sidebar from RawrXD_LSP_SymbolIndex
16. Find All References UI
Gap: Results dump to console
Market Standard: Peek view / separate panel with context
Fix: Create ReferencePanel class with tree structure (file → lines)
17. Rename Refactoring Preview
Gap: Instant rename, no preview of changes
Market Standard: Diff preview before applying rename
Fix: Stage renames in Win32IDE_SubAgent.cpp → show diff overlay → confirm
18. CodeLens (Reference Counts)
Gap: No inline "3 references" above functions
Market Standard: JetBrains/VS Code CodeLens
Fix: Render phantom text in RawrXD_MonacoCore margin area
19. Inlay Type Hints
Gap: auto variables don't show inferred types
Market Standard: auto |string| ghost text
Fix: Extend ghost text renderer in Win32IDE_GhostText.cpp for type hints'
